caption: A man wearing a dark business suit, a light blue dress shirt, and a silver-blue tie stands in an indoor setting with a large window behind him. The background through the window shows a blurred cityscape with buildings in soft tones of white, blue, and beige. The man is holding a dark clipboard or folder under his left arm. He is speaking and gesturing with his right hand, which is raised and moving in front of him. As the sequence progresses, his facial expression shifts from a neutral, focused look to a slight smile with his mouth open while speaking. His right hand moves subtly across his chest, transitioning from a more open gesture to a slightly closed posture, while he remains centered in the frame against the bright, airy backdrop. No text or logos are visible in the scene.
